message:
fix(test): mock useToast in Kubectl + ShareMissionDialog tests (#6252) (#6253)

PR #6246 added `useToast()` calls to Kubectl.tsx and ShareMissionDialog.tsx
to surface download errors, but the existing test suites didn't mock the
Toast module. Result: 18 test failures in Coverage Suite #513, all with
the same root cause:

  Error: useToast must be used within a ToastProvider

Add `vi.mock('../../ui/Toast', ...)` to both test files. The mock returns
a no-op `showToast` so download error surfacing is exercised by the unit
under test without requiring a real `<ToastProvider>` wrapper.

Verified: `npx vitest run Kubectl.test.tsx ShareMissionDialog.test.tsx`
→ 18/18 passing.

Closes #6252

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,6 +49,14 @@ vi.mock('../../../hooks/useKubectl', () => ({ useKubectl: () => ({ execute: vi.f
 
 vi.mock('../../../lib/clipboard', () => ({ copyToClipboard: vi.fn() }))
 
+// #6252: Kubectl now calls useToast() (added by #6246 for download
+// error feedback). Mock the Toast module so tests don't need a
+// ToastProvider wrapper.
+vi.mock('../../ui/Toast', () => ({
+  useToast: () => ({ showToast: vi.fn() }),
+  ToastProvider: ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => children,
+}))
+
 import { Kubectl } from '../Kubectl'
 
 describe('Kubectl', () => {
